title: ENVX Stock Climbs As Enovix Sharpens Smartphone Push
text: Enovix Corporation (NASDAQ: ENVX) surged 11.35% following positive announcements about its battery technology commercialization efforts. Major catalysts include: Bank of America raised its price target from $6 to $7, maintaining a Neutral rating while acknowledging progress with a major smartphone manufacturer. Qualification framework agreement: Management and the lead smartphone partner agreed on a silicon-specific battery qualification framework that relaxes earlier testing bottlenecks. New sales leadership: Steve Bakos, formerly of Infineon where he managed accounts including Apple, joined as Senior Vice President of Worldwide Sales. Expanding pipeline: The company highlighted opportunities across smartphones, smart eyewear, drones, and defense sectors. Stock Performance: ENVX climbed from the mid-$6 range to approximately $7.36, with intraday volatility showing steady staircase move behavior typical of trend days.
